_note: Acted emotion, not physical ground truth: each turn is the model performing the given `instruction`, not a DSP-derived prosody measurement. No expected pitch/energy/rate labels are included here on purpose — see file docstring.

turns.speaker: Speaker A
turns.text: Hey, can we talk about the dishes? They've been piling up all week and I wanted to check in before it becomes a thing.
turns.instruction: Calm, warm, and a little tentative — opening a sensitive conversation gently.

turns.speaker: Speaker B
turns.text: Sure, but I did them Tuesday night. I don't think it's fair to act like I never touch them.
turns.instruction: Calm but guarded, a hint of defensiveness under the surface.

turns.speaker: Speaker A
turns.text: Tuesday was five days ago. I've done every load since then and I'm getting tired of keeping score.
turns.instruction: Tense and clipped, patience visibly running out.

turns.speaker: Speaker B
turns.text: So now I'm the villain because I didn't get to it fast enough? I have a life outside this kitchen too.
turns.instruction: Defensive and sharp, volume and pace rising.

turns.speaker: Speaker A
turns.text: I AM SO SICK OF BEING THE ONLY ONE WHO CARES ABOUT THIS HOUSE! I CANNOT DO THIS BY MYSELF ANYMORE!
turns.instruction: Shout this, furious and losing control.

turns.speaker: Speaker B
turns.text: Wow. Impressive speech. You really do love playing the martyr, don't you.
turns.instruction: Deliver flat, cold, quietly contemptuous — no warmth at all.

turns.speaker: Speaker A
turns.text: I don't want to be the martyr. I just... I wanted us to be a team, and I don't feel like one right now.
turns.instruction: On the edge of tears, hurt and vulnerable.

turns.speaker: Speaker B
turns.text: I don't want that either. I don't want us to be like this. I'm actually scared we're breaking something here.
turns.instruction: Frightened, voice shaking, close to panic.

turns.speaker: Speaker A
turns.text: I don't want that either. Can we just stop and figure out a system together? Something that actually works for both of us?
turns.instruction: Soft, hopeful, still raw but reaching out to repair things.

turns.speaker: Speaker B
turns.text: Yeah. Let's start over. I'm sorry I got so defensive — I do want to fix this with you.
